summary: This week I built a visual testing tool called Glimpse Showroom, which lets you isolate and audit components like the settings panel or hero sections. I also migrated billing to a standalone Worker, hardened security around redirects, and fixed a batch of accessibility issues in the settings pages — touch targets are now a proper 44px. Under the hood, there's a new icon gateway system called Prism that routes all monorepo icons through a single place.
